2604.01212.title: $\texttt{YC-Bench}$: Benchmarking AI Agents for Long-Term Planning and Consistent Execution
2604.01212.paper_summary: As LLM agents tackle increasingly complex tasks, a critical question is whether they can maintain strategic coherence over long horizons: planning under uncertainty, learning from delayed feedback, and adapting when early mistakes compound. We introduce $\texttt{YC-Bench}$, a benchmark that evaluates these capabilities by tasking an agent with running a simulated startup over a one-year horizon spanning hundreds of turns. The agent must manage employees, select task contracts, and maintain profitability in a partially observable environment where adversarial clients and growing payroll create compounding consequences for poor decisions. We evaluate 12 models, both proprietary and open source, across 3 seeds each. Only three models consistently surpass the starting capital of \$200K, with Claude Opus 4.6 achieving the highest average final funds at \$1.27 M, followed by GLM-5 at \$1.21 M at 11$\times$ lower inference cost. Scratchpad usage, the sole mechanism for persisting information across context truncation, is the strongest predictor of success, and adversarial client detection is the primary failure mode, accounting for $47\%$ of bankruptcies. Our analysis reveals that frontier models still fail through distinct failure modes such as over-parallelization, demonstrating the capability gaps for long-horizon performance. $\texttt{YC-Bench}$ is open-source, reproducible, and configurable.
2604.01212.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLM）代理人處理越來越複雜的任務，一個關鍵問題是它們是否能在長期內保持戰略一致性：在不確定性下進行規劃、從延遲反饋中學習，以及在早期錯誤累積時進行調整。我們介紹了 $\texttt{YC-Bench}$，這是一個基準，通過讓代理人在一年的時間範圍內運行模擬創業公司來評估這些能力，涵蓋數百次回合。代理人必須管理員工、選擇任務合同，並在部分可觀察的環境中保持盈利，在這種環境中，對抗性客戶和不斷增長的薪資對糟糕的決策造成了累積後果。我們評估了12個模型，包括專有和開源模型，每個模型使用3個種子。只有三個模型始終超過起始資本 \$200K，其中 Claude Opus 4.6 以 \$1.27 M 的最高平均最終資金名列前茅，接著是 GLM-5，以 \$1.21 M 的 11$\times$ 更低推理成本緊隨其後。Scratchpad 的使用是跨上下文截斷持久化信息的唯一機制，也是成功的最強預測指標，而對抗性客戶檢測是主要的失敗模式，佔據了 $47\%$ 的破產案例。我們的分析顯示，前沿模型仍然通過明顯的失敗模式（如過度並行化）失敗，顯示出長期表現的能力差距。$\texttt{YC-Bench}$ 是開源的、可重現的和可配置的。
2604.01212.author: Muyu He et.al.
2604.01212.authors: Muyu He, Adit Jain, Anand Kumar, Vincent Tu, Soumyadeep Bakshi, Sachin Patro, Nazneen Rajani
